title: A Modpack Kit
description:
This is a pack for people wanting to make a brand to modpack but need some help. :)
!!!!For 1.21 NeoForge!!!!
body:
### Intro
Hello! This modpack was very basic, well until you came along.


### Overview
1.21.1 NeoForge Modpack Kit is currently not optimized for significant performance improvements, but it serves as a template for modpacks. If you encounter compatibility issues, please refer to the Issue page to see if others have experienced the same problem.


### Mods
- AppleSkin
- Architectury API
- Balm
- BetterF3
- Chunky
- Cloth Config API
- Collective
- Colorful Hearts
- Controlling
- Crafting Tweaks
- Cull Leaves
- Curios API Continuation
- Double Doors
- Durability Tooltip
- Dynamic FPS
- FerriteCore
- ImmediatelyFast
- Iris Shaders
- Jade 🔍
- Just Enough Breeding (JEBr)
- Just Enough Items
- Keep My Soil Tilled
- Log Begone
- Model Gap Fix
- ModernFix
- Motschen's Better Leaves
- Mouse Tweaks
- Not Enough Recipe Book [NERB]
- OctoLib
- Passive Shield
- Polytone
- Reese's Sodium Options
- Replanting Crops
- Searchables
- Sodium
- Stack Refill
- SuperMartijn642's Config Lib
- SuperMartijn642's Core Lib
- Wavey Capes
- Zume
- [EMF] Entity Model Features
- [ETF] Entity Texture Features
### How to Use







To use this pack install the version you want, then unlock. Then you can do anything you want. If you publish please leave a link to this modpack. Have a good day moding. :)
